text_fr: Ayant examine Jes  rapports  du  Secretaire  general  sur  la realisation du programme de redressement et de  relevement a  moyen et a long terme dans la region soudano-sahelienne et  Jes mesures  d'urgence  a  prendre  en  faveur  de  cette region 94 ,
text_en: Having examined the reports of the Secretary General on the implementation of the medium- and long-term rehabilitation and rehabilitation programme in the Sudano-Sahelian region and the emergency measures to be taken in favour of that region 94,

items_fr: I . Prend acte  avec  satisfaction du  rapport  du  Secre› taire  general  sur la  realisation  du  programme de redresse› ment et  de  relevement  a  moyen  et  a  long  terme  dans  la region  soudano-sahelienne et  Jes  mesures d'urgence prises en faveur de cette region 95 :

2. Exprime sa gratitude aux  gouvemements, aux orga› nismes  des  Nations  Unies,  aux  organisations  intergouver› nementales,  aux  organisations  pri vees  et  aux  particu liers qui  ont apporte leur aide  a  la  realisation  du  programme de redressement  et  de  relevement  a  moyen  et a long  terme etabli  par  les  Etats  Membres  du  Comite  permanent  inter› Etats de  Jutte  contre la secheresse dans le  Sahe]:

3. Exprime ega/ement sa gratitude aux  gouvernements et organisations internationales, particulierement a l'Organi› sation  des  Nations  Unies  pour  ralimentation  et  l'agricul› ture et au Programme alimentaire mondial, 4ui ont repondu avec  promptitude  et  efficacite  aux  demandes  de  secours d'urgence  emanant  des  pays  de  la region soudano› sahelienne victimes de  la secheresse en  1977:

4. Pric  instamment tous  Jes  gouvernements.  Jes  orga› nismes  des  Nations  Unies,  les  organisations  intergouver› nementales,  Jes  organisations  privees et  Jes  particuliers de continuer a repondre  favorablement,  soit  sur  une  base  hi› laterale,  soit par le  biais du  Bureau des  Nations Unies pour le  Sahe I  ou  tout  autre  intermediaire,  aux  demandes  d' as› sistance  formulees  par Jes  gouvemements  des  pays  mem› bres du  Comite permanent inter-Etats de  Jutte  contre la  se› cheresse dans le  Sahe! et par le  Comite lui-meme:

5. Pric instamme111 Jes  Etats  Membres,  les  institutions financieres  internationales et  Jes  organisations intergouver› nementales d'accroitre leur appui et leur assistance aux me› sures a court terme  prises dans differents domaines par les Etats  membres  du  Comite  permanent  inter-Etats  de  Jutte contre  la  secheresse  dans  le  Sahe!,  pour  ]utter  contre  les effets de  la  secheresse jusqu'a ce  4ue Jes  mesures a moyen et a long terme produisent leur plein  cffet;

6. Prie  instamment Jes Etats  Membres,  particuliere› ment ceux des  pays  developpes,  d'appuyer Jes  efforts des pays  membres  du  Comite  permanent  inter-Etats  de  Jutte contre  la  secheresse  dans  le  Sahe]  visant a constituer des reserves  d'urgence et  de  securite  de  denrees  alimentaires de  base et  de stocks d' intrants agricoles:

7. Prie le  Secretaire  general  de  poursuivre  ses  efforts visant  a  mobiliser  Jes  ressources  financieres  necessaires a la  mise  en  cruvre  des  projets a moyen  et a long  terme identifies  par  Jes Etats  membres  du  Comite  permanent inter-Etats de Jutte contre la secheresse dans le  Sahe);

8. Reaffirme le  role  du  Bureau des  Nations  Unies  pour le  Sahe) comme point central et principal organe charge de coordonner Jes  efforts deployes par Jes  organismes des Na› tions  Unies  pour  aider  Jes  pays  de  la  region  soudano› sahelienne a realiser leur programme de redressement et de relevement;
9. Prie le  Bureau des  Nations  Unies  pour le  Sahe!  de continuer  son  etroite  cooperation  avec  le  Comite  perma› nent  inter-Etats  de  lutte  contre  la  secheresse  dans  le  Sahel
items_en: I . Takes note with satisfaction of the report of the Secretariat-General on the implementation of the medium and long-term rehabilitation and rehabilitation programme in the Sudano-Sahelian region and emergency measures in favour of this region 95:

2. Expresses its gratitude to the Governments, bodies of the United Nations, intergovernmental organizations, special organizations and individuals who have assisted in the implementation of the medium and long-term recovery and rehabilitation programme established by the Member States of the Inter-State Standing Committee on the Law against Drought in the Sahe]:

3. Expresses its appreciation to Governments and international organizations, particularly the Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations and the World Food Programme, 4 have responded promptly and effectively to the emergency relief requests from the countries of the Sudano-Sahelian region affected by drought in 1977:

4. Pric urged all my governments. Is the United Nations organization, the intergovernmental organizations, the private organizations and the private sector to continue to respond favourably, either on a later basis, or through the United Nations Office for the Sahe I or any other intermediary, to the requests for assistance formulated by Is the governments of the countries mem› bres of the Permanent Interstate Committee of Jutte against the dearness in the Sahe! and by the Committee itself:

5. Pric instamme111 Is Member States, the international financial institutions and Is intergovernmental organizations to increase their support and assistance to the short term measures taken in different fields by the Member States of the Permanent Interstate Committee of Jutte against Drought in the Sahe!, in order to combat the effects of drought up to this 4th medium and long term measures produce their full cffet;

6. Urges my Member States, in particular those of the developed countries, to support the efforts of the member countries of the Interstate Standing Committee against Drought in the Sahe] to establish emergency and secure reserves of basic food supplies and stocks of agricultural inputs:

7. Requests the Secretary General to continue his efforts to mobilize the financial resources necessary for the implementation of the medium and long-term projects identified by the Member States of the Permanent Interstate Committee against Drought in the Sahe;

8. Reaffirms the role of the United Nations Office for the Sahe) as the focal point and main body responsible for coordinating the efforts of the United Nations agencies to assist the countries of the Sudano› Sahelian region in carrying out their recovery and rehabilitation programmes;
9. Requests the United Nations Office for the Sahe! to continue its close cooperation with the Permanent Committee on the Fight against Drought in the Sahel

text_en: and its efforts to ensure cooperation and coordination between United Nations programmes and agencies for the implementation of the medium and long-term assistance programme;

items_fr: I 0. Pric le Secretaire  general  de  continuer  de  faire rapport a r  Assemblee  generale,  par  I' intermediaire  du Conseil d'administration du Programme des Nations Unies pour le  developpement et du Conseil economique et social, sur la  realisation  du  programme de  redressement et  de  re› lcvcment a moyen et a long terme dans la  region  soudano› saheliennc.

text_en: Having also submitted the Kuwait Declaration on technical cooperation between developing countries, dated 1 June 1977 10:

text_fr: Reconnaissant !'importance de  la  cooperation  technique entre  pays  en  developpement  dans  la  mise  en  route,  la conception,  !'organisation et  la  promotion  de  la  coopera› tion  entre  pays  en  developpement,  afin  que  ceux-ci  puis› sent  acquerir,  notamment  par eux-memes,  adapter,  trans› forer et mettre en commun les connaissances L't les donnees d'experience  nccessaires,  dans  leur  interct  mutuel,  afin d'assurer leur autonomic nationalc et collective,
text_en: Recognising the importance of technical cooperation between developing countries in the initiation, design, organization and promotion of cooperation between developing countries, so that they can then, in particular by themselves, adapt, transcribe and pool knowledge.

text_fr: Declarant que  la  Conference  des  Nation~  Unies  sur  la cooperation technique entre pays en developpement.  tenuc a Buenos  Aires du 30 aout au 12 scptembre 1978, consti› tue une etape importante sur la  voie du renforcement de  la cooperation entre pays en developpement et quc la  misc e11 ceuvre  des  decisions  qui  y  ont  etc  prises  contrihuerait  de fa;on  importante  au  progres  de  la  cooperation  internatio› nale  pour  le  developpement  et a l'instauration du  nouvcl ordre economique international,
text_en: Declaring that the United Nations Conference on Technical Cooperation among Developing Countries, held in Buenos Aires from 30 August to 12 September 1978, is killing an important step towards strengthening cooperation between developing countries and that the implementation of the decisions taken therein would be an important obstacle to the progress of international cooperation for development and the establishment of the new international economic order,

Considers the Buenos Aires Plan of Action for the Promotion and Implementation of Technical Cooperation among Developing Countries 104 as an important instrument enabling the Inter national Community to intensify and strengthen cooperation among developing countries, thus making the internal cooperation for development more effective;
